interpretation: accepted is the contract status; implementation passed is reserved for independently verified evidence at the declared milestone, while blocked human-only evidence remains visible

requirements.qualification: The deterministic matched evaluation harness, baselines, ablations, trace shards, metrics, cluster confidence intervals, slices and failure analysis are implemented and fixture-tested. The GOV.UK Chat comparator assets retain replayable prompts, structured source-card metadata and explicit rights dispositions: linked sources remain links, the observed screenshot bytes are not retained or published, and any longer answer or copied image requires item-level review. Those dispositions are conservative evidence controls, not legal or licence-verification conclusions. A deterministic nine-aim assessment maps all 95 requirements and 21 controlling clauses to exact hashed evidence, negative findings, exceptions and next actions; it honestly reports eight partly fulfilled aims and one not yet testable aim while Gate 11 remains pending. The complete 28,800-question release run and participant results remain outstanding.

The semantic, publication, Explorer and read-only discovery foundations now run against a bounded 69-record new-child demonstrator. Its frozen Search seed closes at 69/69 with zero unexplained seed omissions; direct out-of-cohort content targets remain typed evidence boundaries and no complete page bodies are retained. The dedicated journey view exposes source queries, group membership, publisher evidence, record provenance, boundaries and portable AI/MCP handoff while remaining explicitly non-authoritative. The static-search contract preserves two-character logical lookup while exact-byte physical postings partitions and 1,000-record document-map shards keep the 5 MiB budget; validator, Explorer and Python discovery retain legacy singleton compatibility and fail closed on contract drift. The no-skip real-Chromium browser gate covers accessibility-relevant behaviour, deep links, Pages fallback, gzip and budgets. This bounded fixture does not satisfy the full GOV.UK corpus, participant, axe, accessibility-expert or screen-reader gates.

The historical unsampled T0 union is closed and integrity-checked at 848,977 candidate keys and 836,998 publication records. The latest unsampled T0R-20260715 bulk-first census is also closed: 3,029,380 source-native candidate identities, 874,507 publication records, 715,902 Search source rows, 35 byte-stable sitemap shards, closed organisations and 3,995 navigation records, six redirects and zero unexplained omissions. A same-day refreeze observed the sitemap expand from 668,475 to 870,398 unique URLs while Search retained 715,898 unique routes, so the closing T1 union remains mandatory. The separately contracted new-child acquisition verifies an exact 69-record Search seed, retains allowlisted Content API metadata and typed one-hop boundary evidence, uses zero model calls and a hard 250-record/500-attempt ceiling, and reproduces from content-addressed envelopes without network access. Its bounded demonstrator is the checked-in Explorer fixture; neither it nor the opening census is a full-corpus release claim. ADR-009 replaces universal Content API lookup with expanded Search metadata plus the versioned govuk-okf-selective-hydration.v2 policy. It selects 170,468 records (19.49%) for missing identity, structure, explicit lifecycle dispositions, structured-link closure and deterministic audit, reducing the theoretical eight-request-per-second network floor to about 5.9 hours. It visibly defers 465,865 attachment/resource or historic records pending an authoritative bulk source or targeted pass; another 233,727 are represented by bulk metadata. Search part extracts are queryable only in an external SQLite/FTS5 analytical cache; the new census stored 449 extracts from 239 multi-part documents while public source records and release outputs remained body-free. Acquisition and hydration reserve writes only when every active repository/cache filesystem will retain at least 10 GiB free, replacing the former retained-metadata ceiling. The old hydration checkpoint is preserved and a new census label is required. The first exact T0 capacity build ran 44,342.28 seconds and failed closed when the ca postings file reached 6,712,946 bytes against 5,242,880. ADR-006 now deterministically partitions complete tokens by exact physical bytes and chunks the document map without changing logical lookup; fast skew, legacy, tamper, discovery and packaging tests pass. Repository-native publication packages virtual shards into bounded, dual-hash, same-origin Pages .pack.gz ranges, mirrors identical assets in a draft-first immutable Release transaction, verifies live byte ranges, and fails closed at 950,000,000 Pages bytes. Capacity remains unresolved until immediate enrichment, deferred-field disposition, exact full build, T1 closing and final zero-omission release reconciliation complete.

The dated public-source audit and preflight exist. The bounded NEW-CHILD-20260715 rights/privacy audit integrity-checks 954 publication assets, classifies 475 items and reports zero body/credential findings, zero retention/secret violations and zero item-review triggers. Its mechanical controls pass, but the sampled checkpoint is not a legal determination and does not substitute for T0/T1 source-union closure, the final snapshot-bound rights scan, or citation verification.

The dedicated journey view exposes source queries, group membership, publisher evidence, record provenance, boundaries and portable AI/MCP handoff while remaining explicitly non-authoritative. The static-search contract preserves two-character logical lookup while exact-byte physical postings partitions and 1,000-record document-map shards keep the 5 MiB budget; validator, Explorer and Python discovery retain legacy singleton compatibility and fail closed on contract drift. The no-skip real-Chromium browser gate covers accessibility-relevant behaviour, deep links, Pages fallback, gzip and budgets. This bounded fixture does not satisfy the full GOV.UK corpus, participant, axe, accessibility-expert or screen-reader gates.

The historical unsampled T0 union is closed and integrity-checked at 848,977 candidate keys and 836,998 publication records. The latest unsampled T0R-20260715 bulk-first census is also closed: 3,029,380 source-native candidate identities, 874,507 publication records, 715,902 Search source rows, 35 byte-stable sitemap shards, closed organisations and 3,995 navigation records, six redirects and zero unexplained omissions. A same-day refreeze observed the sitemap expand from 668,475 to 870,398 unique URLs while Search retained 715,898 unique routes, so the closing T1 union remains mandatory. The separately contracted new-child acquisition verifies an exact 69-record Search seed, retains allowlisted Content API metadata and typed one-hop boundary evidence, uses zero model calls and a hard 250-record/500-attempt ceiling, and reproduces from content-addressed envelopes without network access. Its bounded demonstrator is the checked-in Explorer fixture; neither it nor the opening census is a full-corpus release claim. ADR-009 replaces universal Content API lookup with expanded Search metadata plus the versioned govuk-okf-selective-hydration.v2 policy. It selects 170,468 records (19.49%) for missing identity, structure, explicit lifecycle dispositions, structured-link closure and deterministic audit, reducing the theoretical eight-request-per-second network floor to about 5.9 hours. It visibly defers 465,865 attachment/resource or historic records pending an authoritative bulk source or targeted pass; another 233,727 are represented by bulk metadata. Search part extracts are queryable only in an external SQLite/FTS5 analytical cache; the new census stored 449 extracts from 239 multi-part documents while public source records and release outputs remained body-free. Acquisition and hydration reserve writes only when every active repository/cache filesystem will retain at least 10 GiB free, replacing the former retained-metadata ceiling. The old hydration checkpoint is preserved and a new census label is required. The first exact T0 capacity build ran 44,342.28 seconds and failed closed when the ca postings file reached 6,712,946 bytes against 5,242,880. ADR-006 now deterministically partitions complete tokens by exact physical bytes and chunks the document map without changing logical lookup; fast skew, legacy, tamper, discovery and packaging tests pass. Repository-native publication packages virtual shards into bounded, dual-hash, same-origin Pages .pack.gz ranges, mirrors identical assets in a draft-first immutable Release transaction, verifies live byte ranges, and fails closed at 950,000,000 Pages bytes. Capacity remains unresolved until immediate enrichment, deferred-field disposition, exact full build, T1 closing and final zero-omission release reconciliation complete.

The machine-applicable persona gate passes for 48 evidenced research hypotheses, 17 cross-cutting overlays, 11 required dimensions, all 83 pinned schema families, exhaustive 136-pair overlay scenarios, five high-risk t-way scenarios and two successive held-out no-new challenge passes. One genuine omission, privacy-sensitive context, was added as a contract-supported hypothesis. Human validation remains not authorised, evidence claim-support verification remains an F2 dependency, and the six release-v2 stories per persona must still be regenerated against the final snapshot; no UI preference claim is made.

The deterministic matched evaluation harness, baselines, ablations, trace shards, metrics, cluster confidence intervals, slices and failure analysis are implemented and fixture-tested. The GOV.UK Chat comparator assets retain replayable prompts, structured source-card metadata and explicit rights dispositions: linked sources remain links, the observed screenshot bytes are not retained or published, and any longer answer or copied image requires item-level review. Those dispositions are conservative evidence controls, not legal or licence-verification conclusions. A deterministic nine-aim assessment maps all 95 requirements and 21 controlling clauses to exact hashed evidence, negative findings, exceptions and next actions; it honestly reports eight partly fulfilled aims and one not yet testable aim while Gate 11 remains pending. The complete 28,800-question release run and participant results remain outstanding.

The source preflight covers 32/32 official and 93/93 plan URLs while preserving superseded access failures. The deterministic inventory now covers 137 claims, 205 citation bindings and 117 sources, including every source-page, source-image, official-context, question, bounded excerpt, structured-summary sentence and ordered source-card object in the GOV.UK Chat JSON comparator assets with exact JSON Pointers plus the demonstrator's current AI/MCP references. Screenshot-derived fields bind the expected binary digest; each ordered source-card claim jointly binds the screenshot and destination, while duplicate, gapped or out-of-order positions fail closed. Current frozen evidence passes 158 bindings and 40 joint claims; 47 citation failures and four joint-review failures remain 51 visible blockers because claim-specific evidence or independent semantic-support review is missing or stale. Zero waivers convert that missing verification into a pass. The full inventory, evidence and reviews must be regenerated against the final closing snapshot before publication.

Zero waivers convert that missing verification into a pass. The full inventory, evidence and reviews must be regenerated against the final closing snapshot before publication.

Deterministic orchestration, bounded contracts, a hash-chained append-only activity contract, separate product/paid-API/source-request accounting, explicit access fallbacks, zero-paid-model policy, locked-dependency SBOM and isolated fixture reproduction exist. Candidate promotion and post-publication finalization are now ledger-locked, rollback-safe and replay-safe, and bind frozen source, compiler, generation time, bundle tree, tests, SBOM and immutable clean-room inputs. A completed repository-wide Codex Security campaign records 14 original findings, three residual low findings and their remediation at commit 27890dc; 32 focused post-fix tests pass. Release provenance now requires distinct ACT-F2-RELEASE-SNAPSHOT-CITATION-REVIEWS-TERMINAL-001 and ACT-D2-RELEASE-SNAPSHOT-SECURITY-SCAN-TERMINAL-001 entries that supersede the fixture/pre-release terminals, name the exact release snapshot and hash-bind their required release outputs. All nine post-closing terminal declarations require the exact release snapshot; the two opening T0 declarations remain T0-bound. This is pre-release evidence only: T0 hydration, T1/closing, evaluation, final-snapshot citation/security work, publication, independent adjudication and full-snapshot clean-room terminal evidence remain release work.
